hero_subtitle: Govern AI agents, workflows and models before compliance, security and audit become a problem. Built for Europe's most regulated industries.
features_subtitle: Complete control over every AI agent in your organization
feat_policy_desc: Define what AI agents can do, where, how, and why. Granular rule-based governance with real-time enforcement.
feat_audit_desc: Complete traceability of every AI action. Explainability logs, decision chains, and immutable records.
feat_compliance_desc: AI Act, GDPR, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, DORA, NIS2, SOX, D.Lgs. 262 — track compliance status in real-time.
feat_integration_desc: Seamless connection with IAM, SIEM, ServiceNow, CMDB, and your existing security stack.
feat_risk_desc: Automatic risk assessment aligned with EU AI Act categories. From minimal to unacceptable risk.
feat_ai_desc: GPT-powered compliance advisor. Ask questions about regulations, get actionable guidance instantly.
clients_subtitle: Designed for organizations where compliance is not optional
agents_subtitle: Manage and govern all AI agents in your organization
policies_subtitle: Define governance rules for AI agents
audit_subtitle: Complete traceability of all AI operations
assistant_subtitle: Ask questions about EU AI Act, GDPR, ISO standards, and AI governance
usecases_subtitle: Real scenarios, real regulations, measurable results
uc_banking_title: Bank with 12 AI agents in production
uc_banking_scenario: An Italian bank must demonstrate DORA compliance within 90 days. 12 AI agents in production, no documentation, imminent audit.
uc_banking_point1: Registers and classifies 12 agents by risk in 1 hour
uc_banking_point2: Automatically maps policies to DORA requirements
uc_banking_point3: Generates auditor report in one click
uc_health_title: Hospital with AI agents for diagnostics
uc_health_scenario: A hospital uses 3 AI agents for diagnostic analysis on sensitive data. The DPO must ensure no agent accesses PII without authorization.
uc_health_point1: GDPR policy automatically blocks unauthorized access
uc_health_point2: Every sensitive data access is tracked in audit trail
uc_health_point3: ARIA guides the DPO through GDPR article by article
uc_health_result: Zero data breach. GDPR compliance certified.
uc_legal_title: Law firm with high-risk AI agents
uc_legal_scenario: A law firm uses AI agents for contract analysis. EU AI Act classifies these systems as high risk: technical documentation and human oversight required.
uc_legal_point1: Automatically classifies agents by risk level
uc_legal_point2: ARIA generates technical documentation Art. 9 EU AI Act
uc_legal_point3: Human-in-the-loop policy for every critical decision
uc_legal_result: EU AI Act compliant. Liability reduced by 80%.
